name: Rashad
description:
Rashad is a team captain in the Survey Corps' Fourth Squad under the command of [Hange Zoe](https://anilist.co/character/71121).

While Rashad is shown to be a brave and conditioned soldier, he also has shown himself to be a rather considerate man, watching over fellow wounded soldiers along with [Nifa](https://anilist.co/character/126849/Nifa). He is also shown to prioritize his fellow soldiers' well-being over immediate threats to himself, retrieving water to soothe burned soldiers while engaged with the [Colossal Titan].
